name: Buraimon

signature_move.name: Tsubame Nimai Gaeshi
signature_move.description: Minces the enemy with a cross-slash unleashed with its swords.

description: A Bird Man Digimon that evolved after continuous sword training. After training, it acquired enough skill to freely wield two swords. It is on a training pilgrimage , wandering across the Digital World while working as a bodyguard, relying on its honed sword abilities. It is rumored to take any job for a reward, and is often treated as an outlaw. However, it actually has a kind nature that never forgets its spirit of helping the weak, and will never take jobs that torment the weak. Its Special Moves are mincing the enemy with a cross-slash that it quickly unleashes with both its swords ( Tsubame Nimai Gaeshi ), and a counter in which it deals a spinning slash while ascending towards flying targets ( Hiken: Asuka Otoshi ).
